performance.title: Elevate Your Performance
performance.description: We craft high-performance sportswear that helps you achieve your best. From the gym to the street, our products are designed for athletes who demand excellence.

newArrivals.title: New Arrivals
newArrivals.description: Check out our latest additions to the collection.

newsletter.title: Newsletter
newsletter.description: Subscribe to receive exclusive offers and product updates.

reviews.title: Customer Reviews
reviews.basedOnReviews: {count, plural, =0 {Based on no reviews} one {Based on # review} other {Based on # reviews}}

aboutPage.title: About Us
aboutPage.description: We believe every athlete deserves high-performance gear

ourStory.title: Our Story
ourStory.paragraph1: <name>{name}</name> was founded in <year>{year}</year> by a group of passionate athletes who saw a gap in the market for high-quality, affordable sportswear.
ourStory.paragraph2: We started in a small garage with a big dream: to create sportswear that combines performance, style, and comfort. Today, we serve athletes worldwide.
ourStory.paragraph3: Every piece we design is inspired by real athletes' needs, and we rigorously test them to ensure they meet our high standards.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.description: Our mission is to empower every athlete to achieve their best performance by providing innovative, high-quality sportswear. We are committed to continuous innovation, sustainability, and serving our community of athletes.

values.title: Our Values
values.performanceDescription: We design every product to maximize athletic performance
values.qualityDescription: We use only the finest materials and technologies available
values.passionDescription: We are athletes designing for athletes

team.title: Our Team
team.description: Our team consists of passionate athletes, designers, and engineers working together to create the best sportswear.

contactPage.title: Contact Us
contactPage.description: Have questions or need assistance? We're here to help. Reach out to our customer support team for any inquiries or concerns.

contactInformation.title: Contact Information
contactInformation.description: Feel free to reach out to us with any questions or inquiries. Our team is ready to help you.

faqsPage.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faqsPage.description: Find answers to your most common questions
faqsPage.checkFaqs: Check out our FAQ page for quick answers to the most commonly asked questions.

items.a: Standard shipping takes 3–5 business days within the UAE. International shipping takes 7–14 business days depending on destination.
Yes! Once your order ships, you'll receive a tracking email with a live link.
Yes, free shipping is available on orders over AED 200 within the UAE.
We accept returns within 30 days in original condition.

items.q: How do I exchange an item?
items.a: Request an exchange via contact page or email and we’ll handle shipping.

items.q: How do I find the right size?
items.a: Use the size guide on each product page for best fit.
Yes, all products are 100% authentic from authorized suppliers.

items.q: Can I get notified when an item is back in stock?
items.a: Yes, enter your email on the product page to get notified.

items.q: What payment methods do you accept?
items.a: We accept Visa, Mastercard, Apple Pay, and Cash on Delivery.
Yes, all payments are encrypted using SSL security.

hero.title: Privacy Policy
hero.description: How we handle and protect your data

introduction.title: Introduction
introduction.body: We respect your privacy and are committed to protecting your personal data. This policy explains how we collect, use, and safeguard your information when you use our website.

informationWeCollect.title: Information We Collect
informationWeCollect.body: We may collect personal information such as your name, email address, shipping address, and payment information when you create an account or complete a purchase. We also collect usage data to improve your experience.

howWeUseYourInformation.title: How We Use Your Information
howWeUseYourInformation.body: We use your data to process orders, provide customer service, send updates and promotions, improve our products and services, and ensure the security of our website.

sharingYourInformation.title: Sharing Your Information
sharingYourInformation.body: We do not sell your personal data. We may share it with trusted service providers such as shipping carriers and payment gateways only to the extent necessary to deliver our services.

cookies.title: Cookies
cookies.body: We use cookies to enhance your experience, remember your preferences, and analyze site traffic. You can manage cookies through your browser settings.

dataSecurity.title: Data Security
dataSecurity.body: We use SSL encryption and strict security measures to protect your data. However, no method of transmission over the Internet is 100% secure.

yourRights.title: Your Rights
yourRights.body: You have the right to access, correct, or delete your personal data. To do so, please contact us via the Contact page.

updates.title: Updates to This Policy
updates.body: We may update this policy from time to time. Any changes will be posted on this page with the updated date.

hero.title: Terms and Conditions
hero.description: The rules that govern the use of our site

acceptanceOfTerms.title: Acceptance of Terms
acceptanceOfTerms.body: By accessing and using our website, you agree to be bound by these Terms and Conditions. If you do not agree, please do not use the site.

useOfSite.title: Use of the Site
useOfSite.body: You agree to use the site only for lawful purposes and in a way that does not infringe on the rights of others or restrict their use of the site.

accounts.title: Accounts
accounts.body: You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your account credentials and for all activities that occur under your account. Notify us immediately of any unauthorized use.

productsAndPricing.title: Products and Pricing
productsAndPricing.body: We strive to display product colors and descriptions as accurately as possible. Prices are subject to change without notice. We reserve the right to refuse or cancel any order.

ordersAndPayment.title: Orders and Payment
ordersAndPayment.body: All orders are subject to confirmation and availability. Payment is required at the time of order using our accepted payment methods.

shippingAndReturns.title: Shipping and Returns
shippingAndReturns.body: The shipping and return policies outlined on our FAQ and customer service pages apply to all orders.

intellectualProperty.title: Intellectual Property
intellectualProperty.body: All content on this site, including logos, images, and text, is our property or licensed to us and is protected by copyright laws.

limitationOfLiability.title: Limitation of Liability
limitationOfLiability.body: We will not be liable for any indirect, incidental, or consequential damages arising from your use of the site or products.

governingLaw.title: Governing Law
governingLaw.body: These Terms are governed by and construed in accordance with the laws of the United Arab Emirates.

changesToTerms.title: Changes to Terms
changesToTerms.body: We reserve the right to modify these Terms at any time. Updates will be posted on this page with the revised date.

profilePage.title: My Profile
profilePage.description: Manage your personal info and security settings

password.title: Change Password
password.description: Use a strong password to keep your account secure.

dangerZone.title: Danger Zone
dangerZone.description: Manage sensitive account actions, including signing out of your account or permanently deleting it. Some actions cannot be undone.
dangerZone.deleteAccountDescription: Your account and all data will be permanently deleted. This action cannot be undone.
dangerZone.deleteAccountMessage: This action cannot be undone. Your account will be permanently deleted.

about.title: About Us
about.description: Providing premium products and exceptional shopping experiences.
